fresh_facts.claim: US forces conducted major strikes including A-10s and B-1 bombers targeting IRGC bunkers, with one bunker containing 50 IRGC leaders, across over 7,000 total targets in Iran's military infrastructure.
IRGC intelligence chief Maj. Gen. Majid Khademi was killed in a joint US-Israeli airstrike on Monday.
Israel executed extensive strikes in Tehran targeting IRGC sites, missile facilities, and petrochemical plants, with explosions near Azadi Square and Sharif University.
49 civilians were killed and 58 injured in the heaviest attacks in over a week according to HRANA report.
Iran launched 14 missiles and 19 drones at UAE in the past 24 hours.
Iranian missiles hit Haifa, Israel, killing 4 people in a residential building.
Iran has launched a cumulative total of 519 ballistic missiles, 26 cruise missiles, and 2,210 drones since the war began.
IRGC vowed 'Operation Crushing Revenge' for Maj. Gen. Khademi's killing, targeting planners and perpetrators.
Trump threatened severe strikes on Iran by Tuesday evening if no ceasefire deal is reached.
Pakistan proposed a 45-day ceasefire between the US-Israeli coalition and Iran.
Iran rejected the US ceasefire proposal to reopen the Strait of Hormuz on April 6.
US Central Command reported precision strikes on Kar Island targeting 90+ targets.
A US F-15 crew shot down Friday was rescued in what was called one of the largest US missions ever.
Saudi Arabia downed 7 Iranian ballistic missiles in the past 24 hours.
Iranian attacks on Gulf energy infrastructure and Strait of Hormuz control spiked global oil prices.

regime_fall.current_status: Day 41 sees conflicting succession reports with claims of Supreme Leader Khamenei's death and establishment of a Provisional Leadership Council, while military escalation continues with Israeli strikes on petrochemical infrastructure, Iranian regional attacks, and hardline leadership consolidation amid contradictory diplomatic signals including a U.S. 5-day bombing pause and ceasefire proposals that Iran has rejected.
regime_fall.last_major_event: Supreme Leader Ali Khamenei reportedly killed in strikes, with a Provisional Leadership Council established comprising President Pezeshkian, judiciary chief Mohseni-Ejei, and cleric Alireza Arafi, while Mojtaba Khamenei reportedly assumed the role of Supreme Leader.
